text: Framed poster-photograph of a Bristlecone Pine with text
People are standing outside of a hut with a cow.
A knife sitting on top of a wooden table next to a knife.
A man in a red snowsuit riding a snowboard.
Two street signs posted on a street light pole near the city
a close up of two giraffes standing near one another
Two men throw a frisbee back and forth in a grassy area.
A group of white folks sit in front of laptop computers.
A building with a clock on the side and front of it near a road.
A bus with a woman on the side and back of hit going down the road beside other vehicles.
